metadata.name: NetSentinel Default Rules
metadata.description: Built-in detection rules for common threats

known_bad_ports.description: Ports commonly used by malware, trojans, and backdoors

known_c2_patterns.description: Patterns indicative of Command & Control communication
indicators: Regular beacon intervals (low coefficient of variation)
Small fixed-size packets at regular intervals
Long-lived connections with periodic small data bursts
Traffic to known TOR exit nodes or VPN endpoints

protocol_anomalies.dns_over_non53: DNS traffic on ports other than 53/5353
